facebook.caption:
POV: you booked a snorkel tour and accidentally got the best day of your trip.

Layla Mermaid Tours runs a 4-island escape out of Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and the 5.0★ from 192 reviews is not a fluke. Snorkeling, beach BBQ, four islands in one day. That's a full itinerary handled.

If you're only doing one sea day in Phu Quoc, this is the one to lock in.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
